title: Restricted Action Kinds Policy
description: Pattern policy backing the Compliance-2 approval gate. Each rule names a class of action (financial-transfer, contract-binding, ...) and a list of regex patterns. An action item whose title or summary matches any pattern is flagged `restricted=true` and blocked from self-execution until the operator approves the specific item id.

version.description: ISO date for the policy revision (e.g. 2026-04-27).

id.description: Stable id used in `ActionItemPolicy.restriction_rule_id` and audit entries.

items.description: Case-insensitive regex. Word boundaries (\b) should be applied explicitly here when the language allows; CJK patterns can rely on character matching.
